infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Tesco ERM tracks your location while you're checked in so HR can see your live work status. Tracking stops the moment you check out.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tesco ERM uses your location to record office check-ins and verify field-work attendance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Tesco ERM keeps sharing your location with HR while you're checked in, even when the app is in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Tesco ERM shares your location with HR while you're checked in. Tracking stops automatically when you check out.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Tesco ERM shares your location with HR while you're checked in, even when the app is closed. Tracking stops the moment you check out.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Tesco ERM uses your location to record check-ins and verify field-work attendance.
plugins.androidBackgroundPermissionRationale: Tesco ERM needs Allow all the time so we can share your live location with HR between check-in and check-out. Without this, HR sees you as Offline within minutes of the app being backgrounded.
